description: Lock Castle Garrison Logistics to medieval castle defensive operation rather than concentric-castle design or Roman medical stores.

checks.reason: The node remains anchored to a conservative High Medieval castle-garrison logistics scope.
Fortification is the defensive enclosure substrate for garrison operations.
Concentric castles are a specialized castle design, not a prerequisite for castle garrison logistics generally.
Roman military medical supply stores are outside the sourced medieval castle provisioning scope.
